tasks.label: git-commit-select-civ
tasks.command: git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" add -A && git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" commit -F "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli/tools/_commit_msg.txt" && git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" log --oneline -3

tasks.label: git-commit-select-civ-2
tasks.command: git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" add -A; git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" status --short; git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" commit -F "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli/tools/_commit_msg.txt"; git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" log --oneline -3

tasks.label: compute-md5
tasks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$r='c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli/src/vp-compat'; $files = @('UI/FrontEnd/SelectCivilization.lua','UI/FrontEnd/CivVAccess_VP_SelectCivilizationAccess.lua'); foreach ($f in $files) { $p = Join-Path $r $f.Replace('/','/'); $h=(Get-FileHash $p -Algorithm MD5).Hash; Write-Host "$f MD5=$h" }"

tasks.label: git-commit-fix-select-civ
tasks.command: git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" add -A; git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" status --short; git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" commit -F "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli/tools/_commit_msg.txt"; git -C "c:/Users/nemex/OneDrive/Documenti/GitHub/civvaccess-voxpopuli" log --oneline -3
